title: Build a Simple Recommendation Engine
input_format: User-item rating matrix and target user ID, number of recommendations
output_format: List of recommended item indices sorted by predicted rating
constraints: 1 <= users <= 1000, 1 <= items <= 1000, ratings are 0-5 where 0 means unrated
function_signature: function recommend(ratings: number[][], userId: number, numRecs: number): { recommendations: number[] }
